pageContext.name: Monster X
pageContext.description: Monster X, from 'Godzilla: FINAL WARS,' joins S.H.MonsterArts! Featuring sharp, edgy sculpting and a whip-like twin tail, it perfectly captures the kaiju's terrifying on-screen appearance. Overseen by sculptor Mitsuhiko Hosokawa, who designed S.H.MonsterArts' distinctive jointing systems, it is fully posable without compromising the look or feel of the character. It even includes a pair of grappling hands for re-creating the climactic match against Godzilla.
